macro_context: Bond rout dominant: 30Y at 5.198% (2007 high), 10Y 4.687%. Rising real yields crushing all risk assets. India gold duty hike 6%→15% removes structural physical demand. Oil deadlock (Hormuz at 5% throughput). Third straight equity loss. Risk-off regime.

XAG-USD.notes: Down 5.6% today — worst in weeks. India duty hike + real yield pressure. Below 20-day MA. Hard stop at 72 for existing position.

XAU-USD.notes: Down 1.7%. Mean-reversion entry at 4506 slightly underwater. RSI recovering from 23.8 extreme. 2xATR stop at 4493 technically breached.

BTC-USD.notes: Range-bound 76.5-77K. ETF flows recovering but insufficient vs yield headwind. 75K = critical support.

ETH-USD.notes: Below 200-day MA (2367). 53% below ATH. Exchange supply at yearly low (bullish long-term). 2500 checkpoint still pending.

MSTR.notes: Tracking BTC weakness. 843K BTC treasury. Market punishing aggressive buying. Proxy signal at 46.6% — needs mNAV-based improvement.

trade_ideas.rationale: Mean-reversion entry at 4506 with RSI 23.8 extreme still valid thesis. Stop technically breached by 0.49x ATR but BUY re-fired at RSI 35.7. Hold unless price breaks below 4450.
Remnant 20.45 oz at 6.43 avg, deeply underwater. India duty hike + 5.6% daily loss = bearish. But hard stop at 2 not hit. Trend exhaustion possible at 0.
Range-bound, no edge at 52.8% consensus accuracy. Wait for 85K breakout (Bold) or 73K capitulation (Patient). Signal system near coin-flip — no actionable signal.

signal_system_findings.critical_asymmetry: BUY accuracy collapsed across all signals (RSI BUY 41.8% vs SELL 80.2%). Market regime signature — downtrend makes BUY unreliable. System better at SELL detection right now.

signal_system_findings.xag_flipflop_cause: Only 6-7 effective voters after regime gating. Persistence filter relaxed to 1 cycle for metals on May 11 — single-cycle flips cause consensus oscillation.
signal_system_findings.overtriggering: 20 Layer 2 invocations today in ranging market, most producing HOLD. Trigger threshold calibrated for 17 voters but only 7-9 effective.

risk_warnings: BOND ROUT: 30Y at 5.2%, 62% of fund managers expect 6%. Further yield spike = flash crash risk across all assets.
SILVER VULNERABILITY: -5.6% today, India duty hike structural negative. 0 break = accelerated selling.
XAU STOP BREACHED: Mean-reversion entry at 4506 has 2xATR stop technically breached. Thesis still valid but on thin ice.
SIGNAL ACCURACY: System at ~50% consensus accuracy — near coin-flip. Low confidence in any directional signal.
LAYER 2 NOISE: 20 invocations producing mostly HOLD = wasted compute + risk of false action on one lucky trigger.
research_highlights: ConnorsRSI(2): RSI(2)<10 BUY, 72% win rate on BTC (stratbase.ai). Simple, additive to existing RSI(14).
Variance Ratio regime: VR(k)<1 = MR, >1 = trending. Directly addresses 80% unknown regime problem.
Absorption Ratio: PCA-based cross-asset regime detector (SSRN 1633027, score 8.55). Already added as module, pending validation.
Multi-LLM disagreement meta-signal: Compose existing LLM votes. When Ministral/Qwen3 agree on BTC, 68.7% accuracy.
Gold-Silver ratio ML MR: GSR z-score + ML regime filter improves Sharpe 0.3→0.73 (SSRN 5710242).
